arts.ttl: Joao Felix offers Chelsea dream €175m swap deal opportunity
arts.sum: AC Milan may have to cash in on Rafael Leao to afford a permanent deal for Joao Felix, potentially presenting an exciting opportunity to Chelsea . During that press conference, Felix also revealed that compatriot Rafael Leao was one of the first Milan players to welcome him to his new club, but in the summer, the two could go their separate ways.

arts.ttl: AC Milan against Verona with fourth place in mind
arts.sum: Hellas Verona have never won away against Milan (D13 L19) nor against Inter; since their first Serie A season in 1957/58, they’ve played the most times at a single stadium (San Siro) without winning: 24 draws and 41 defeats in 65 previous such matches. Although Hellas Verona have scored only one goal in the last three matches against Milan in Serie A, the Venetians have scored 66 goals overall against the Rossoneri in the competition, only against Fiorentina (71) have they scored more (also 66 against Lazio).

arts.ttl: Milan Set to Bench Pulisic Against Verona as Conceição Considers Tactical Shift
arts.sum: AC Milan, still reeling from their Champions League playoff first-leg defeat to Feyenoord, are preparing to face Hellas Verona in Serie A on Saturday. Manager Sergio Conceição is contemplating a tactical reshuffle, with Christian Pulisic potentially starting on the bench. arts.ttl: Kyle Walker: “I Joined Milan to Reignite My Love for Football”
arts.sum: In a revealing interview with GQ Italia, Kyle Walker, one of AC Milan's five winter transfer window signings, shared insights into his career, his move to Italy, and his renewed passion for the game. The English defender spoke candidly about his journey from Sheffield to Milan and the motivations behind his recent transfer.
